title: [DSP-7893] Modernize seiji-dockerbase for py3.11 + uv
description:
## Summary
- upgrade base image to Ubuntu 24.04 and switch seiji-dockerbase to Python 3.11.11 with uv as the default Python runtime/installer path
- align toolchain defaults (Terraform 1.3.2, Kubernetes 1.33.0, newer NVM) and modernize Docker apt keyring setup for 24.04
- convert dockerbase CI variants to py3.11-only tags, including terraform1.3.2 and node16 variants consumed by orchestrator
- apply Wiz-driven hardening to reduce Critical/High findings: remove legacy Node 15, move Node 20 to 20.20.0, upgrade global npm, prune helm plugin cache artifacts, and install Docker CLI without daemon/runtime binaries
- add non-interactive apt cleanup plus final distro security refresh (`dist-upgrade`) and purge unneeded `wget`

## Ticket
- DSP-7893

## Wiz Findings Follow-up
- fixed in image where feasible without breaking required compatibility pins
- remaining risk expected primarily from pinned runtime/tool versions (notably Terraform 1.3.2 and transitive embedded Go deps)
- follow-up can include controlled version bumps for Terraform/Helm/Helmsman/plugins after compatibility validation

## Test plan
- [x] Run seiji-dockerbase pipeline on this branch and confirm all kaniko jobs publish expected py3.11 tags
- [x] Re-run seiji-orchestrator image jobs (`build:kaniko`, `build:kaniko_311`, `build:kaniko_terraform1_py311`, `build:kaniko_airflow`)
- [ ] Trigger fresh container scan on this branch and compare Critical/High counts against previous baseline

diffs.diff:
@@ -4,7 +4,7 @@
 # only way to pass a DRY value to this variable and the refs below
 variables:
   SOUSCHEF_VERSION: &_SOUSCHEF_VERSION "master"
-  SOUSCHEF_VARIANT: "py3.10"
+  SOUSCHEF_VARIANT: "py3.11"
 
 include:
   - project: "abacusinsights/lunatic-dove/kitchen-souschef"
@@ -14,26 +14,20 @@ include:
     file: "/gitlab_templates/kaniko/build.yml"
     ref: *_SOUSCHEF_VERSION
 
-build:kaniko_39:
+build:kaniko_311:
   extends: build:kaniko
   variables:
-    EXTRA_DOCKER_BUILD_ARGS: "--build-arg python_version_arg=3.9.9 --build-arg poetry_version=2.1.1"
-    EXTRA_DOCKER_TAGS: seiji-dockerbase-py3.9
+    EXTRA_DOCKER_BUILD_ARGS: "--build-arg python_version_arg=3.11.11"
+    EXTRA_DOCKER_TAGS: seiji-dockerbase-py3.11
 
-build:kaniko_310:
+build:kaniko_terraform1_py311:
   extends: build:kaniko
   variables:
-    EXTRA_DOCKER_BUILD_ARGS: "--build-arg python_version_arg=3.10.6 --build-arg poetry_version=2.1.1"
-    EXTRA_DOCKER_TAGS: seiji-dockerbase-py3.10
+    EXTRA_DOCKER_BUILD_ARGS: "--build-arg python_version_arg=3.11.11 --build-arg terraform_version_arg=1.3.2"
+    EXTRA_DOCKER_TAGS: seiji-dockerbase-terraform1.3.2-py3.11
 
-build:kaniko_terraform1_py310:
+build:kaniko_node16_py311:
   extends: build:kaniko
   variables:
-    EXTRA_DOCKER_BUILD_ARGS: "--build-arg python_version_arg=3.10.6 --build-arg terraform_version_arg=1.1.7 --build-arg poetry_version=2.1.1"
-    EXTRA_DOCKER_TAGS: seiji-dockerbase-terraform1.1.7-py3.10
-
-build:kaniko_node16_py310:
-  extends: build:kaniko
-  variables:
-    EXTRA_DOCKER_BUILD_ARGS: "--build-arg python_version_arg=3.10.6 --build-arg node_version_arg=16.17.1 --build-arg poetry_version=2.1.1"
-    EXTRA_DOCKER_TAGS: seiji-dockerbase-node16-py3.10
+    EXTRA_DOCKER_BUILD_ARGS: "--build-arg python_version_arg=3.11.11 --build-arg node_version_15=16.17.1"
+    EXTRA_DOCKER_TAGS: seiji-dockerbase-node16-py3.11

@@ -1,119 +1,107 @@
-# 20.04 is an LTS release
-FROM ubuntu:20.04
+# Ubuntu LTS base for Seiji-related Docker builds
+FROM ubuntu:24.04
 SHELL ["/bin/bash", "-o", "pipefail", "-c"]
 
-ARG python_version_arg=3.10.6
-ARG terraform_version_arg="0.13.7"
-ARG poetry_version="1.8.5"
-ARG node_version_15="15.13.0"
-ARG node_version_20="20.19.0"
+# Bump python_version_arg to the latest 3.11.x patch when rebuilding the image.
+ARG python_version_arg=3.11.15
+ARG terraform_version_arg="1.3.2"
+ARG nvm_version_arg="0.40.3"
+ARG node_version_20="20.20.0"
 
-
-# Note: We are installing yq version 3 here, the syntax for commands registered with
-# yq version 3 are not backwards compatible with the changes introduced in yq version 4
+# mikefarah/yq v4 (not legacy yq v3)
 ENV TERRAFORM_VERSION=$terraform_version_arg \
-    NVM_VERSION="0.35.3" \
-    KUBERNETES_VERSION="1.32.0" \
+    NVM_VERSION=$nvm_version_arg \
+    KUBERNETES_VERSION="1.33.0" \
     HELM_VERSION="3.18.5" \
     HELM_DIFF_VERSION="3.13.0" \
     HELM_S3_VERSION="0.13.0" \
     HELMSMAN_VERSION="3.17.1" \
     PYTHON_VERSION=$python_version_arg \
-    NODE_VERSION_15=$node_version_15 \
     NODE_VERSION_20=$node_version_20 \
     YQ_VERSION="v4.42.1"
 
 # OS packages and updates
 RUN apt-get update -y && apt-get upgrade -y && \
     DEBIAN_FRONTEND="noninteractive" apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
-    apt-transport-https \
-    automake \
-    build-essential \
     ca-certificates \
     curl \
     gettext-base \
     git \
-    gpg-agent \
     groff \
     jq \
     less \
-    libbz2-dev \
-    libffi-dev \
-    libpng-dev \
-    libreadline-dev \
-    libsqlite3-dev \
-    libssl-dev \
-    libtool \
     openssh-client \
-    make \
-    software-properties-common \
     unixodbc-dev \
     unzip \
     vim \
-    wget \
-    zlib1g-dev \
     zsh \
     zip \
-    && apt-get autoremove && apt-get autoclean && apt-get clean && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*
+    && apt-get autoremove -y && apt-get autoclean && apt-get clean && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*
 
-RUN wget https://github.com/mikefarah/yq/releases/download/${YQ_VERSION}/yq_linux_amd64 -O /usr/bin/yq \
+RUN curl -fsSL "https://github.com/mikefarah/yq/releases/download/${YQ_VERSION}/yq_linux_amd64" -o /usr/bin/yq \
     && chmod +x /usr/bin/yq
 
-# pyenv (apt requirements above, see https://gist.github.com/jmvrbanac/8793985)
-ENV PATH="/root/.pyenv/shims:/root/.pyenv/bin:/root/.pyenv/plugins:${PATH}"
-ENV PYENV_ROOT="/root/.pyenv"
-RUN git clone https://github.com/yyuu/pyenv.git /root/.pyenv && \
-    pyenv init - && \
-    pyenv install ${PYTHON_VERSION} && \
-    pyenv global ${PYTHON_VERSION} && \
-    pip install --upgrade pip
+# uv is the default installer for Python tools and packages.
+ENV UV_INSTALL_DIR=/usr/local/bin
+RUN curl -LsSf https://astral.sh/uv/install.sh | sh
 
-# poetry    
-ENV PATH="/root/.local/bin:${PATH}"
-RUN pip install packaging
-RUN curl -sSL https://install.python-poetry.org | python3 - --version ${poetry_version}
+ENV PATH="/root/.local/bin:/usr/local/bin:${PATH}"
+RUN uv --version && \
+    uv python install --default ${PYTHON_VERSION} && \
+    python3 --version
 
 # terraform
 RUN cd /tmp && \
-    wget https://releases.hashicorp.com/terraform/${TERRAFORM_VERSION}/terraform_${TERRAFORM_VERSION}_linux_amd64.zip && \
-    unzip terraform_${TERRAFORM_VERSION}_linux_amd64.zip && \
+    curl -fsSL "https://releases.hashicorp.com/terraform/${TERRAFORM_VERSION}/terraform_${TERRAFORM_VERSION}_linux_amd64.zip" -o "terraform_${TERRAFORM_VERSION}_linux_amd64.zip" && \
+    unzip "terraform_${TERRAFORM_VERSION}_linux_amd64.zip" && \
     mv terraform /usr/local/bin/ && \
     cd - && rm -rf /tmp/*
 
-# intall nvm and two node versions
-RUN curl -o- https://raw.githubusercontent.com/nvm-sh/nvm/v${NVM_VERSION}/install.sh | bash && \
+# install nvm and node 20
+RUN curl -o- "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/nvm-sh/nvm/v${NVM_VERSION}/install.sh" | bash && \
     . /root/.nvm/nvm.sh && \
     nvm install ${NODE_VERSION_20} && \
-    nvm install ${NODE_VERSION_15} && \
-    nvm alias default ${NODE_VERSION_15}
+    nvm alias default ${NODE_VERSION_20}
 
-# set up environment variables for nvm and node versions, old version first
-ENV NODE_PATH="/root/.nvm/versions/node/v${NODE_VERSION_15}/lib/node_modules" \
-    PATH="/root/.nvm/versions/node/v${NODE_VERSION_15}/bin:${PATH}"
+# set up environment variables for nvm and node version
+ENV NODE_PATH="/root/.nvm/versions/node/v${NODE_VERSION_20}/lib/node_modules" \
+    PATH="/root/.nvm/versions/node/v${NODE_VERSION_20}/bin:${PATH}"
 
 # yarn and yalc
 RUN npm install --global yarn && \
-    yarn global add yalc
+    yarn global add yalc && \
+    npm install --global npm@latest && \
+    npm cache clean --force
 
 # kubectl, helm, and helmsman
 RUN cd /tmp && \
-    curl -LO https://dl.k8s.io/release/v${KUBERNETES_VERSION}/bin/linux/amd64/kubectl && \
+    curl -LO "https://dl.k8s.io/release/v${KUBERNETES_VERSION}/bin/linux/amd64/kubectl" && \
     mv kubectl /usr/local/bin && \
     chmod 755 /usr/local/bin/kubectl && \
-    wget https://get.helm.sh/helm-v${HELM_VERSION}-linux-amd64.tar.gz && \
-    tar -xvf helm-v${HELM_VERSION}-linux-amd64.tar.gz && \
+    curl -fsSL "https://get.helm.sh/helm-v${HELM_VERSION}-linux-amd64.tar.gz" -o "helm-v${HELM_VERSION}-linux-amd64.tar.gz" && \
+    tar -xvf "helm-v${HELM_VERSION}-linux-amd64.tar.gz" && \
     mv linux-amd64/helm /usr/local/bin && \
     mkdir /root/.helm && mkdir /root/.helm/plugins && \
     helm plugin install https://github.com/hypnoglow/helm-s3.git --version $HELM_S3_VERSION && \
     helm plugin install https://github.com/databus23/helm-diff --version $HELM_DIFF_VERSION && \
-    curl -L https://github.com/Praqma/helmsman/releases/download/v${HELMSMAN_VERSION}/helmsman_${HELMSMAN_VERSION}_linux_amd64.tar.gz | tar -C /usr/local/bin -zxv && \
+    curl -L "https://github.com/Praqma/helmsman/releases/download/v${HELMSMAN_VERSION}/helmsman_${HELMSMAN_VERSION}_linux_amd64.tar.gz" | tar -C /usr/local/bin -zxv && \
+    rm -rf /root/.cache/helm && \
     cd - && rm -rf /tmp/*
 
-# docker
-RUN curl -fsSL https://download.docker.com/linux/ubuntu/gpg | apt-key add - && \
-    add-apt-repository "deb [arch=amd64] https://download.docker.com/linux/ubuntu $(lsb_release -cs) stable" && \
-    apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends docker-ce docker-ce-cli containerd.io && \
-    apt-get autoremove && apt-get autoclean && apt-get clean && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*
+# docker cli (Ubuntu 24.04+ / apt-key deprecated; use keyring)
+RUN install -m 0755 -d /etc/apt/keyrings && \
+    curl -fsSL https://download.docker.com/linux/ubuntu/gpg -o /etc/apt/keyrings/docker.asc && \
+    chmod a+r /etc/apt/keyrings/docker.asc && \
+    echo "deb [arch=$(dpkg --print-architecture) signed-by=/etc/apt/keyrings/docker.asc] https://download.docker.com/linux/ubuntu $(. /etc/os-release && echo "${VERSION_CODENAME}") stable" > /etc/apt/sources.list.d/docker.list && \
+    apt-get update -y && \
+    DEBIAN_FRONTEND="noninteractive" apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends docker-ce-cli && \
+    apt-get autoremove -y && apt-get autoclean && apt-get clean && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*
+
+# final security refresh and prune tools not needed in runtime image
+RUN apt-get update -y && \
+    DEBIAN_FRONTEND="noninteractive" apt-get dist-upgrade -y && \
+    DEBIAN_FRONTEND="noninteractive" apt-get purge -y wget && \
+    apt-get autoremove -y && apt-get autoclean && apt-get clean && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*
 
 # aws cli
 RUN curl "https://awscli.amazonaws.com/awscli-exe-linux-x86_64.zip" -o "awscliv2.zip" && \
@@ -126,11 +114,11 @@ ENV PATH="/root/.cargo/bin:$PATH"
 RUN curl --proto '=https' --tlsv1.2 -sSf https://sh.rustup.rs | sh -s -- -y
 
 # oh-my-zsh
-RUN wget https://github.com/robbyrussell/oh-my-zsh/raw/master/tools/install.sh -O - | zsh && \
+RUN curl -fsSL https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ohmyzsh/ohmyzsh/master/tools/install.sh | zsh && \
     echo && \
     echo "###" && \
     echo "completed build with pinned tool versions:" && \
-    echo $(env | grep _VERSION) && \
+    echo "$(env | grep _VERSION)" && \
     echo "###" && \
     echo && \
     echo "fin" && \

approvals.title: [DSP-7893] Modernize seiji-dockerbase for py3.11 + uv
approvals.description:
## Summary
- upgrade base image to Ubuntu 24.04 and switch seiji-dockerbase to Python 3.11.11 with uv as the default Python runtime/installer path
- align toolchain defaults (Terraform 1.3.2, Kubernetes 1.33.0, newer NVM) and modernize Docker apt keyring setup for 24.04
- convert dockerbase CI variants to py3.11-only tags, including terraform1.3.2 and node16 variants consumed by orchestrator
- apply Wiz-driven hardening to reduce Critical/High findings: remove legacy Node 15, move Node 20 to 20.20.0, upgrade global npm, prune helm plugin cache artifacts, and install Docker CLI without daemon/runtime binaries
- add non-interactive apt cleanup plus final distro security refresh (`dist-upgrade`) and purge unneeded `wget`

## Ticket
- DSP-7893

## Wiz Findings Follow-up
- fixed in image where feasible without breaking required compatibility pins
- remaining risk expected primarily from pinned runtime/tool versions (notably Terraform 1.3.2 and transitive embedded Go deps)
- follow-up can include controlled version bumps for Terraform/Helm/Helmsman/plugins after compatibility validation

## Test plan
- [x] Run seiji-dockerbase pipeline on this branch and confirm all kaniko jobs publish expected py3.11 tags
- [x] Re-run seiji-orchestrator image jobs (`build:kaniko`, `build:kaniko_311`, `build:kaniko_terraform1_py311`, `build:kaniko_airflow`)
- [ ] Trigger fresh container scan on this branch and compare Critical/High counts against previous baseline
